---
title: "TableS6"
output: html_document
---

```{r,message=F,warning=F}
library(Seurat)
library(reshape2)
orig.id=c("Exp1-SSS","Exp1-STS","GILGFVFTL","Exp2-SSS","DMSO")
names(orig.id)=c("tai1","tai2","liugan","sss","wutai")

load("data/CD8_tai_5samples_clean_Annotation.Rdata")
rna=sce@assays$RNA$data

#specific clonetype
barcode_cdr3=read.csv(paste("data/tai1_filtered_contig_annotations_filteredcontig.csv",sep=""))
cdr3=read.csv(paste("data/tai1_sepcific_ABpair_N_clonetype.csv",sep=""))

cell_cdr3=merge(barcode_cdr3,cdr3)
tai1_specif_cells=cell_cdr3$barcode

#tai2
barcode_cdr3=read.csv(paste("data/tai2_filtered_contig_annotations_filteredcontig.csv",sep=""))
cdr3=read.csv(paste("data/tai2_sepcific_ABpair_N_clonetype.csv",sep=""))

cell_cdr3=merge(barcode_cdr3,cdr3)
tai2_specif_cells=cell_cdr3$barcode

#liugan
barcode_cdr3=read.csv(paste("data/liugan_filtered_contig_annotations_filteredcontig.csv",sep=""))
cdr3=read.csv(paste("data/liugan_sepcific_ABpair_N_clonetype.csv",sep=""))

cell_cdr3=merge(barcode_cdr3,cdr3)
liu_specif_cells=cell_cdr3$barcode

#wutai
barcode_cdr3=read.csv(paste("data/wutai_filtered_contig_annotations_filteredcontig.csv",sep=""))
cdr3=read.csv(paste("data/wutai_sepcific_ABpair_N_clonetype.csv",sep=""))
cell_cdr3=merge(barcode_cdr3,cdr3)
wu_specif_cells=cell_cdr3$barcode

#sss
barcode_cdr3=read.csv(paste("data/SSSDLKYLK_contig_annotations_filteredcontig.csv",sep=""))
cell_cdr3=barcode_cdr3
sss_specif_cells=cell_cdr3$barcode

specific_cells=c(paste("tai1",tai1_specif_cells,sep="_"),paste("tai2",tai2_specif_cells,sep="_"),
                 paste("liugan",liu_specif_cells,sep="_"),paste("wutai",wu_specif_cells,sep="_"),
                 paste("sss",sss_specif_cells,sep="_"))

rna=rna[,is.element(colnames(rna),specific_cells)]
rna=rna[rowSums(rna)!=0,]
rna=as.matrix(rna)

sce$specific_clone=sce$celltype_Final
sce$specific_clone[!is.element(colnames(sce),specific_cells)]="non-specific"

#specific_clone
meta=sce@meta.data
umap_loc=Embeddings(sce,reduction = "umap")
#identical(rownames(meta_Tcell),rownames(umap_loc))
meta=cbind(meta,umap_loc)
meta$Celltype=meta$specific_clone
meta$Celltype[meta$Celltype=="T_prol"]="Tpro"
meta_Tcell=meta

meta=meta_Tcell[meta$Celltype!="non-specific",]
stat=as.data.frame(table(meta[,c("orig.ident","Celltype")]))
stat$freq=stat$Freq/table(meta$orig.ident)[stat$orig.ident]
stat$Total=table(meta$orig.ident)[stat$orig.ident]
stat$label=paste(stat$Freq,"/",stat$Total,sep="")

stat=stat[order(stat$freq,decreasing = T),]
stat$orig.ident=orig.id[as.character(stat$orig.ident)]
stat$orig.ident=factor(stat$orig.ident,levels = c("Exp1-SSS","Exp1-STS","GILGFVFTL","Exp2-SSS","DMSO"))

stat_dt=dcast(stat,orig.ident~Celltype,value.var = "Freq")
stat_dt$Total=rowSums(stat_dt[,-1])
print(stat_dt)
#write.xlsx(stat_dt,"TableS6_Cellnumber.xlsx")

stat_dt=dcast(stat,orig.ident~Celltype,value.var = "freq")
stat_dt$Total=rowSums(stat_dt[,-1])
print(stat_dt)
#write.xlsx(stat_dt,"TableS6_CellFreq.xlsx")
```
